[4°19′56″S 15°18′11″E﻿ / ﻿4.3322°S 15.3031°E﻿ / -4.3322; 15.3031](https://geohack.toolforge.org/geohack.php?pagename=Parliament_of_the_Democratic_Republic_of_the_Congo&params=4.3322_S_15.3031_E_)

The **Parliament of the Democratic Republic of the Congo** ([French](/wiki/French_language "French language"): *Parlement de la République Démocratique du Congo*) is the legislative branch of the Congolese government. It consists of two chambers:

* The [Senate](/wiki/Senate_of_the_Democratic_Republic_of_the_Congo "Senate of the Democratic Republic of the Congo") ([Upper Chamber](/wiki/Upper_chamber "Upper chamber"))
* The [National Assembly](/wiki/National_Assembly_of_the_Democratic_Republic_of_the_Congo "National Assembly of the Democratic Republic of the Congo") ([Lower Chamber](/wiki/Lower_chamber "Lower chamber"))

The most recent Parliament was inaugurated on January 28, 2019.[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)[[3]](#cite_note-3)

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Parliament_of_the_Democratic_Republic_of_the_Congo&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")]

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [[icon]](/wiki/File:Wiki_letter_w_cropped.svg) | This section **needs expansion**. You can help by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Parliament_of_the_Democratic_Republic_of_the_Congo&action=edit&section=). *(September 2021)* |

By 28 May 2021, 32 members of the DRC parliament, 5% of the total, had died due to [COVID-19](/wiki/COVID-19 "COVID-19") during the [COVID-19 pandemic in the Democratic Republic of the Congo](/wiki/COVID-19_pandemic_in_the_Democratic_Republic_of_the_Congo "COVID-19 pandemic in the Democratic Republic of the Congo").[[4]](#cite_note-4)
